comments.comment: Increase in asbestos disposal due to an increase in asbestos material accepted at the facility.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Reported releases of Total Particulate Matter, PM10, and PM2.5 increased in 2019, relative to 2018.  This increase is attributable to an increase in the total number of vehicle kilometers travelled on unpaved roads at the facility in 2019.  In 2018, the contribution of road dust from unpaved roads was not included in the calculation of releases as on-site vehicles at the facility travelled less than 10,000 kilometers on unpaved roads.
